programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: In the wake of the shoot-offs with Bronson's men, Red Bill and McCoy must come together for a common goal; Thompson's pressure on Steve reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill and McCoy's quest for Bronson comes to a breaking point, as impossible decisions and realizations are made; Bronson takes a new step toward power; Steve faces Thompson in a final standoff.

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: In order to ensure the survival of his family, Jesse James forms a gang; Custer seeks glory in the Indian Wars; Crazy Horse fights against the U.S.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: Jesse James targets the railroads; Custer goes on a secret mission in Sioux Territory; Grant contends with the growing unrest in the South and West.

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton gets hired to bring Jesse James to justice; settlers descend upon Sioux land to mine gold; Grant tries to keep the peace.

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: Custer rides to a showdown at Little Big Horn with the Sioux; Jesse James hopes to make a big statement when he targets a bank in the northern territory.

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: Billy the Kid uses his talent with a gun to get what he wants; Sitting Bull and Crazy Horse make an important decision; Wyatt Earp fights for what's right.

programme.desc: Jesse James resurfaces after years in hiding; Billy the Kid avenges the death of his friend; Wyatt Earp questions his future as a man of the law.

programme.desc: Wyatt Earp heads to Tombstone; Billy the Kid and Pat Garrett's cat-and-mouse game reaches a climax; Sitting Bill is back in America.

programme.title: The American West
programme.desc: Sitting Bull is accused of inciting a rebellion; Wyatt Earp turns his back on the law in his search for true justice; Jesse James is confronted by the Ford Brothers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.sub-title: Chapter One: A Head Weighs Less Than a Body
programme.desc: Far off in the West, bounty hunter Red Bill searches for the man who slew his mother; in nearby Greenvale, where it hasn't rained for years, local farmer Steve finds gold beneath his land; Sheriff McCoy comes upon a small fortune.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: After Red Bill is captured, old memories come back to haunt him; McCoy comes upon Butler's farm; Steve and Eve's relationship woes intensify.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill travels the barren wastes with McCoy and Kurt; in Greenvale, Eve's struggle to maintain her business is threatened; Thompson's claim to Steve's land is taken up a notch.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Fifteen years earlier, Red Bill learns about being a man from a rugged Civil War veteran, Anderson; McCoy and his vile older brother, Bronson, must resort to increasingly dark means as they struggle to survive the desert.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill, McCoy and Kurt enter the mines, where trouble ensues; Eve faces dire consequences for her actions; a modern-day Bronson runs for governor.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Rain comes to Greenvale, bringing with it great struggle; Bronson's men encounter McCoy and Red Bill; unexpected reunions abound.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: In the wake of the shoot-offs with Bronson's men, Red Bill and McCoy must come together for a common goal; Thompson's pressure on Steve reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: Comic Book Men
programme.desc: The Stash holds an auction to help a friend sell his collection; relating to one of Spider-Man's enemies.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Kaya is pregnant and living comfortably at Dan and Emily's home, but starts having second thoughts about the surrogacy after a night at the club.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Dan is tormented by the information he found out about Kaya; Kaya decides to bring her relationship with Emily's nephew, Jack, out into the open.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Kaya recovers from the premature birth, but the baby's future is uncertain; Dan settles into his new role as a father, while Emily fears that something isn't right.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Dan and Emily disagree about whether to take legal action; Kaya grows closer to Siobhan, not realizing her involvement with Eleanor.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kaya, determined to make a life for herself, meets Emily, and begins to get a taste for how the other half lives.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Shere Hite
programme.desc: Shere Hite's pioneering study of women's sexuality, "The Hite Report," sells millions of copies but also triggers ferocious backlash from the media.

programme.title: Corsage
programme.desc: Faced with a future of strict ceremonies and royal duties, Empress Elisabeth of Austria rebels against her public image and comes up with a plan to protect her legacy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: What Comes Around
programme.desc: A love affair becomes a menacing game of cat and mouse where nothing is what it seems.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Fight!
programme.desc: Having split everything in their lives after their break-up, a man and a woman must compete in a ridiculous custody battle for their prized drinking bar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pretty Problems
programme.desc: A couple on the rocks are pulled along by absurdly wealthy strangers for a wine country getaway that turns into the most unhinged weekend of their lives.
